Caladesi Island Coffee Co.

Home / Food & Beverage / Caladesi Island Coffee Co.

Caladesi Island Coffee Co. brings the essence of a secluded island retreat to coffee lovers. With a commitment to quality and a passion for unique flavors, we serve La Colombe premium coffees, single-origin espressos, refreshing cold brews, and signature island-inspired lattes.

Enjoy unique juices, fresh pastries, and locally sourced treats in a coastal-escape atmosphere. Whether you're grabbing your morning fuel or settling in for a relaxed afternoon, Caladesi Island Coffee Co. is your island getaway -- right here in Liberty Township.

Location

6735 Lakota Lane

Liberty Township, OH

45044

Hours

Caladesi Island Coffee Shop Hours

7am -- 2pm everyday

Restaurants

Mon-Thurs 11am -- 9pm

Friday 11am -- 10pm

Saturday 10am -- 10pm

Sunday 10am -- 9pm

Bar Hours

Monday -- Thursday 11am -- 10pm

Friday 11am -- 11pm

Saturday 10am -- 11pm

Sunday 10am -- 9pm
